# Base User Signature

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module provides a new field on users to store the user's digital signature

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

1. Go to *Settings > Users & Companies > Users*.
2. Open one of the existing users.
3. You can set a digital signature for it on the field "Signature".

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/social/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/social/issues/new?body=module:%20base_user_signature%0Aversion:%2016.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.
